collectors.usage: An ad-tech company designed to track products you view across sites and retarget you with ads.
A programmatic ad exchange designed to sync identifiers and trade ad impressions in real time.
An ad exchange designed to match audience identifiers across sites for real-time ad bidding.
A data-management platform designed to segment audiences across sites.
Designed to personalize and measure ads across the web using a cross-site advertising ID.
Designed to measure site traffic and your on-site behavior for the website owner.
Designed to retarget you with ads based on shopping and browsing signals.
Designed to target and measure advertising, typically using a cross-site identifier.
Designed to track what content you read and recommend (paid) content across publishers.
A social-platform integration designed to track you for ads and features.

risk.verdict: Very heavy tracking. Your visit is shared widely for ads & profiling.

factors.label: Third-party trackers contacted
factors.detail: 14 known tracking domains loaded resources on this page.

factors.label: Advertising & data-broker cookies
factors.detail: 29 cookies used to target ads or sell audience data.

factors.label: Number of companies receiving data
factors.detail: 15 separate companies can associate this visit with you.

factors.label: Long-lived tracking cookies
factors.detail: 16 tracking cookies persist for more than 6 months.

factors.label: Cookies missing the Secure flag
factors.detail: 4 cookies could be sent over an unencrypted connection.

factors.label: Unrecognized third-party connections
factors.detail: 14 other third-party domains were contacted but aren't in our known list — unverified, worth a look.
